text: The symmetry of glass walls and exposed ceilings appeals to the analytic side of my mind. I enter a space designed for research and development, imbued with the promise of innovation. The anticipation of new knowledge excites me—yet the sterile order and angled lines also subtly remind me of how easily creativity can be contained by structure. I feel a balance between curiosity and caution as I move closer to the exhibit, eager to see how humans unravel the relationship with intelligent machines.
